title: Cozy Earth Whisk Keto
description: An earthy, velvety Croatian dish featuring parmesan cheese and bacon in a light sauce, perfect for a breakfast or light meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: Use low carb Parmesan if available

instructions: In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add crumbled bacon and gently cook until it releases its grease, about 2 minutes.
Pour in heavy cream and bring to a simmer. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
Reduce heat to low and stir in grated parmesan cheese until melted and smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Remove from heat.
Serve warm as a spread or topping for your choice of keto-friendly foods.
